description: CUE-first feature workflow: design, deepen, spec, then mint the contract before implementation tickets exist.

steps.title: design: feature boundary
steps.description: Record the feature boundary and contract candidates.

goal.description: Design field captures ownership and CUE-shaped semantics.

steps.title: deepen: feature surfaces
steps.description: Ground relevant repo and external surfaces before spec.

goal.description: Deepen notes cite verified commands and reused seams.

steps.title: spec: freeze feature contract
steps.description: Freeze CUE names, invariants, and verifier seams.

goal.description: Spec notes name the CUE contract and fail-closed fixtures.
The repository verifier is green with the new contract.

steps.title: prove: rollout
steps.description: Prove the minted capability is adopted in a real workflow or record a tracked deferral.

goal.description: Closeout links rollout adoption evidence or an explicit deferral bead.
